petitioner_background: The petitioner filed an employment-based immigrant visa petition seeking classification as an alien of extraordinary ability under Section 203(b)(1)(A) of the Immigration and Nationality Act. No substantive details about the petitioner's field, nationality, or qualifications are provided in the decision, as the appeal was withdrawn before any merits review on appeal.
outcome_reasoning: The appeal was dismissed based on its withdrawal by counsel. On March 13, 2007, counsel requested that the appeal on behalf of the petitioner be withdrawn. The AAO did not reach the merits of the petition or analyze any of the regulatory criteria because the withdrawal terminated the appeal.
legal_citations: Section 203(b)(1)(A) of the Immigration and Nationality Act, 8 U.S.C. § 1153(b)(1)(A)
fraud_or_procedural_issues: Counsel withdrew the appeal on March 13, 2007, resulting in procedural dismissal without any merits review by the AAO.
